text.p:
I am a lecturer in english and linguistics at the university of .only yesterday i discovere4d you did a paper on SMS in at the conference in History in March, 2007 at the University .Please could you send to me the electronic paper by email or surface paper for hard copy to my address as listed under my signature. I have also enjoyed your paper on sermonic discourses which I got in last year.
Incidentaly am researching on christian sermonic discourses for my PhD. Please pass my phone and email to , who I met and got acquainted to at 2001 MLAN conference in . Looking forward to receiving from you.
